title: Parosela insignis
taxonomy: Parosela insignis is classified as a species of plant in the family Sapindaceae. It belongs to the genus Parosela, which consists of several species of plants. The classification of Parosela insignis is further defined by its botanical name, which is used to identify it uniquely within the plant kingdom. The Sapindaceae family is a group of plants commonly known as the soapberry family. Parosela insignis is a specific type of plant within this family and genus.
